answer_en:
Diaphragm
Origin: Posterior aspect of xiphoid process, internal surfaces of lower costal cartilages and ribs 7-12, medial and lateral arcuate ligaments, vertebral bodies of L1-L3, and anterior longitudinal ligament
Insertion: Central tendon of diaphragm
